step_rationale: Eicosapentaenoic acid metabolite; cardioprotective omega-3 lipid mediator, systemic metabolic remodelling.
mechanism: EPA-derived lipid mediator provides cardioprotection via anti-inflammatory metabolic remodelling and improved myocardial energetics.

references.title: Eicosapentaenoic acid ethyl ester, cardiac metabolomic and lipidomic signatures, and cardioprotection in myocardial infarction.
